ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "school_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website URL for the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the team belongs to */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_level" TEXT /* Level of the team */,
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing in the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "stat_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "stat_field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "stat_field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "stat_three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "stat_three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "stat_free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "stat_free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "points_total" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds_total" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player in the season */,
  "blocks_total" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player in the season */,
  "assists_total" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "stat_season_points_per_game" TEXT /* Average points scored by the player per game in the season */,
  "stat_season_rebounds_per_game" TEXT /* Average rebounds made by the player per game in the season */,
  "stat_season_blocks_per_game" TEXT /* Average blocks made by the player per game in the season */,
  "stat_season_assists_per_game" TEXT /* Average assists made by the player per game in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_types" (
  "stat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic type */,
  "stat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic type */,
  "stat_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the statistic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent for the user's access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "player_position_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started playing the position */,
  "player_position_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player stopped playing the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_season_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the season */,
  "team_season_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the season */,
  "team_season_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_players" (
  "game_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_player_starting_lineup" INTEGER /* Whether the player was in the starting lineup for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
